start.text: Hello, adventurer. I seem to have misplaced my sword. Can you help me find it?

accept_quest.text: Thank you! I think I left it somewhere in the playground. It's a diamond sword.

decline_quest.text: Ah, that's a shame. Well, if you change your mind, you know where to find me.

quest_started.text: Have you found my sword yet?

has_sword.text: You found my sword! Thank you so much!

quest_complete.text: I can finally get back to practicing my swordsmanship!

start.text: Hello there! What a beautiful day!
